paper_metadata.title: Unsupervised Cross-lingual Representation Learning at Scale
paper_metadata.abstract: This paper shows that pretraining multilingual language models at scale leads to significant performance gains for a wide range of cross-lingual transfer tasks. We train a Transformer-based masked language model on one hundred languages, using more than two terabytes of filtered CommonCrawl data. Our model, dubbed XLM-R, significantly outperforms multilingual BERT (mBERT) on a variety of cross-lingual benchmarks, including +14.6% average accuracy on XNLI, +13% average F1 score on MLQA, and +2.4% F1 score on NER. XLM-R performs particularly well on low-resource languages, improving 15.7% in XNLI accuracy for Swahili and 11.4% for Urdu over previous XLM models. We also present a detailed empirical analysis of the key factors that are required to achieve these gains, including the trade-offs between (1) positive transfer and capacity dilution and (2) the performance of high and low resource languages at scale. Finally, we show, for the first time, the possibility of multilingual modeling without sacrificing per-language performance; XLM-R is very competitive with strong monolingual models on the GLUE and XNLI benchmarks. We will make our code, data and models publicly available.

extraction_data.innovation: XLM-R introduces large-scale multilingual masked language modeling trained on 100 languages using filtered Common Crawl data, significantly improving cross-lingual transfer performance, especially for low-resource languages, while addressing the trade-off between positive transfer and capacity dilution.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Filtered Common Crawl data (over 2 terabytes) in 100 languages
extraction_data.application: Cross-lingual classification, sequence labeling, question answering, natural language inference, named entity recognition
extraction_data.research_problem: Cross-lingual understanding (XLU) and unsupervised cross-lingual representation learning at scale
extraction_data.extension: Scaled training on cleaned Common Crawl data, increasing data for low-resource languages by two orders of magnitude compared to prior work.
extraction_data.paper_title: Unsupervised Cross-lingual Representation Learning at Scale

extraction_data.innovation: XLM-RoBERTa builds on XLM-R by incorporating improvements inspired by RoBERTa, such as optimized training procedures and larger-scale data, achieving state-of-the-art performance on cross-lingual benchmarks and competitive results on monolingual benchmarks like GLUE and XNLI.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Filtered Common Crawl data (over 2 terabytes) in 100 languages
extraction_data.application: Cross-lingual classification, sequence labeling, question answering, natural language inference, named entity recognition, monolingual fine-tuning tasks
extraction_data.research_problem: Cross-lingual understanding (XLU) and unsupervised cross-lingual representation learning at scale
extraction_data.extension: Optimized learning procedures inspired by RoBERTa, enabling better performance on both cross-lingual and monolingual benchmarks.
extraction_data.paper_title: Unsupervised Cross-lingual Representation Learning at Scale

extraction_data.innovation: Improves cross-lingual understanding by scaling multilingual masked language models and optimizing language sampling and vocabulary size. Demonstrates better performance on low-resource languages when trained on CommonCrawl compared to Wikipedia.
extraction_data.application: Cross-lingual understanding, multilingual natural language processing tasks
extraction_data.extension: Simplifies multilingual tokenization using SentencePiece (SPM) instead of language-specific preprocessing and byte-pair encoding (BPE).
extraction_data.paper_title: Unsupervised Cross-lingual Representation Learning at Scale

extraction_data.innovation: Increases model capacity to handle more languages while mitigating the curse of multilinguality, showing improved performance on cross-lingual tasks compared to smaller models like XLM-7.
extraction_data.application: Cross-lingual understanding, multilingual natural language processing tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: Unsupervised Cross-lingual Representation Learning at Scale

extraction_data.innovation: Extends multilingual support to 100 languages, demonstrating the trade-off between high-resource and low-resource language performance and the impact of vocabulary size and language sampling on model effectiveness.
extraction_data.application: Cross-lingual understanding, multilingual natural language processing tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: Unsupervised Cross-lingual Representation Learning at Scale
